reviews.title: Best tennis shoes ever
reviews.text: I cannot say enough good things about these Adidas Cloud foam shoes. They are seriously the most comfortable shoes I've ever worn. I've had a black pair and white/grey pair for 3 years, wear almost daily and they still look new. They are easy to wash in the machine and dry in the sun. The support is fair; you could always add an orthotic if you need more support! Buy then!

reviews.title: Great shoe if you need to put inserts or orthotics inside
reviews.text: This shoe is a slip on, so you have to have a foot that can slip into it, order on the larger side for you to do this, or have a shoe horn.  It is not a supportive arch, but this works for me as I have orthotics that need to go inside of the shoe.  They are attractive.  If you are looking for a high arch shoe this is not the shoe for you, the inside of the shoe is flat and hard.  Just know that going in.  If you can't bend your foot or have a  high insole you may need a shoe horn, or need to wear thin socks.  But a great knock around shoe.

title: New Balance Men's 574 V2 Evergreen Sneaker
description: Experience soft support in a stylish lifestyle shoe with the New Balance 574v2 sneaker. Featuring ENCAP midsole cushioning and a cushioned heel, these kicks are built to keep your feet comfy all day long. The breathable upper keeps your feet secure without weighing you down. Whether you need a casual shoe to take you through your errands or a hint of sporty style on a night out, the 574v2 has you coveredBuilt to last, this sneaker is more than just a style icon. Durable materials and quality New Balance craftsmanship take the design to the next level. The 574 style has been around since the '80s, and for good reason. The retro silhouette, bold color blocking and classic branding has made it a favorite among sneakerheads and fashionistas alike. With a range of colors and details, and available for both men and women, the 574v2's possibilities are endless.Step up your street style with this iconic sneaker. Pick the color and material combinations that speak to you and let your personality shine through your new shoes. Never a boring choice, this retro sneaker elevates any outfit from your classiest to your most casual. It's sure to become a favorite in your day-to-day shoe rotation. 100% Suede Made in the USA or Imported Rubber sole Iconic: The New Balance 574v2 sneakers boast the best of retro style and modern design elements. Featuring the signature silhouette sneakerheads have loved since the '80s, these iconic kicks are a must-have in your shoe closet. High-Tech: These aren't your typical lifestyle shoes. They have built-in technology for long-term wearability. ENCAP midsole cushioning combines soft foam with a durable polyurethane rim to deliver all-day support. Comfortable Construction: These sneakers are crafted for your comfort. They feature a lightweight upper so your foot won't feel constricted and a foam cushioned heel for a cloud-like feel. The rubber outsole is built to last wear after wear. NB Heritage: Put on these retro sneakers and feel the New Balanc

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Venture 7 Running Shoes
description: Take on the toughest terrain in confidence with the men's GEL-VENTURE 7 performance trail running shoe by ASICS. Featuring GEL technology and an EVA midsole, this shoe is made for athletes who love to run in the great outdoors. GEL technology in the rearfoot area of the shoe provides shock absorption where you need it most, while the ORTHOLITE sockliner provides an additional layer of cushioning underfoot. It even molds to the shape of your feet, making each run even more comfortable than the last. Extra support comes from the sturdy upper crafted from synthetic leather, while the internal heel counter gently helps your foot remain in its natural line of motion, making for a more efficient stride. Meanwhile the EVA midsole protects your feet against impact and increases rebound, giving you an energetic feeling as you clock up the miles. Durable and practical, the GEL-VENTURE 7 shoe makes an excellent training partner whether you're new to trail running or a seasoned pro. Synthetic-and-mesh Imported Ethylene Vinyl Acetate sole Ortholite X-40 Sockliner: This premium sockliner features higher rebound properties while providing excellent moisture management and a high-level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of O2 Partners LLC.) Rearfoot GEL technology cushioning system: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance. Ortholite X-40 Sockliner: This premium sockliner features higher rebound properties while providing excellent moisture management and a high-level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of O2 Partners LLC.) Rearfoot GEL technology cushioning system: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance. Trail Specific Outsole: Reversed lugs provide uphill and downhill traction on all types of terrain.

reviews.text: I love these shoes, they are so comfortable and they fit perfectly. I have bigger feet and they are a bit persnickety and sensitive in certain areas, so it's hard to find shoes for my feet. Luckly for me these shoes are so soft and they are very comfortable around the toes, arch, back heal, and back ankle. The fabric does not rub against the skin in an annoying fashion, it's very soft fabric. I bought these shoes for school, up coming vacations, and day-to-day errands, because they are a very stylish black, and they don't make your feel look huge, or bigger than they actually are. reviews.title: Bought these for fall/winter wear.
reviews.text: I have worn sketchers slip on sneakers for many years.  This pair  I just purchased, contains memory foam & is different in fit and style  from the D'lites slip on mule that I usually purchase. This resilient slip on is quite comfortable, and fits very well but it differs in so far  as I am able to "walk out" of the shoes frequently.  I am unable to ascertain at this point what the difference is, or why this happens, but I am tending to think that the way the shoe is cut & shaped in the upper heel  area, allows a little more width, where in my foot is able to slide out of the shoe much easier.  I didn't return the sneakers because I needed a black pair for winter. But I am able to cope with the negativity of walking out of the shoes because in bad weather I will be wearing a heavier boot. I will not probably buy this particular style and type again. I just hope that sketchers  continues to manufacture the D lights slip on's that I normally buy.
reviews.author: AG4Y4EBPLR4UJZ4VW72E4U6VPFZQ

reviews.title: Better than I expected
reviews.text:
My wife recently purchased me these sneakers for work when she noticed how worn my Others were. I'll be honest, I wasn't expecting to like the TEAL when she first showed them to me. But, after they arrived and they were worn to work, I was surprised by how many people were complementing the color. That got me a 'told ya so' from her when I got home.
The shoes are simple and straightforward. You can slip them on and off without tying the ties. A synthetic mesh upper with a thin insole is pretty much all the shoe is. VERY lightweight, feeling more like house shoes that sneakers.
The sole is a hard plastic, the offers a different kind support. A little more ridged than normal. After you've walked around in them you'll see how light and comfortable they are. Enjoy

title: adidas Men's Grand Court Sneaker
description: A '70s style reborn. These men's shoes take inspiration from iconic sport styles of the past and move them into the future. They're crafted with a suede upper and leather-like details. Signature 3-Stripes flash along the sides. Plush midsole cushioning gives comfort to every step.Renacimiento del estilo de los 70. Estos zapatos deportivos para hombre están inspirados en el icónico estilo deportivo del pasado, pero transportado al futuro. Están hechos con un empeine de gamuza y detalles de imitación de cuero. Cuentan con las 3 bandas características en los laterales. La amortiguación de la entresuela de felpa proporciona comodidad a cada paso.Ein 70er Jahre Stil Reborn. Diese Herrenschuhe lassen sich von ikonischen Sportstilen der Vergangenheit inspirieren und bringen sie in die Zukunft. Sie sind mit einem Obermaterial aus Wildleder und lederähnlichen Details gefertigt. Signatur-3-Streifen blinken entlang der Seiten. Plüsch-Mittelsohlen-Dämpfung gibt Komfort bei jedem Schritt.נולד מחדש בסגנון שנות ה-70. נעלי גברים אלה לוקחות השראה מסגנונות הספורט האיקוניים של העבר ומזיזות אותם אל העתיד. הם מיוצרים עם גפה מזמש ופרטים דמויי עור. סימן ההיכר של שלושה פסים מהבהבים בצדדים. ריפוד סוליה אמצעית קטיפתי מעניק נוחות לכל צעד.تم تصميم السبعينيات من جديد. هذه الأحذية الرجالية مستوحاة من الأنماط الرياضية الأيقونية في الماضي وتحريكها إلى المستقبل. مصنوع بجزء علوي من الشمواه وتفاصيل تشبه الجلد. 3 خطوط مميزة تومض على طول الجانبين. نعل أوسط مبطن من القطيفة يوفر الراحة في كل خطوة.Um estilo dos anos 70. Estes sapatos masculinos inspiram-se em estilos esportivos icônicos do passado e os levam para o futuro. Eles são feitos com um cabedal de camurça e detalhes parecidos com couro. Três listras exclusivas piscam ao longo das laterais. Entressola de amortecimento de pelúcia dá conforto a cada passo.70 年代风格重生。 这款男鞋灵感来自过去的标志性运动风格,并将它们带入未来。 它们采用麂皮鞋面和皮革般细节精心制作。 侧面标志性 3 条纹闪光。 毛绒中底缓冲让您每一步都倍感舒适。70년대 스타일이 다시 탄생했습니다. 이 남성용 신발은 과거의 상징적인 스포츠 스타일에서 영감을 얻어 미래로 이동시킵니다. 스웨이드 갑피와 가죽 같은 디테일로 제작되었습니다. 측면을 따라 시

Non-Slip MD Sole: Effectively reduce cushioning force and provide sufficient friction,let each step of your move all relaxed. reviews.title: Wrong for Plantar Fasciitis
reviews.text: The claims made in the description of these shoes are all wrong- as a recovered Plantar Fasciitis  patient I have learned what causes and cures foot problems. Soft bendy shoes without arch support are what caused my Plantar Fasciitis. These shoes are the exact recipe for that issue. To protect your feet wear shoes with firm support that don’t twist and make sure they have good arch support inside. This description doesn’t even mention arch support so buyer beware !

description: With a redesigned midsole and upper, our new GEL-Venture® 6 delivers excellent shock absorbing comfort, so you can take on the trail. Your tread will benefit from the rugged, one-piece outsole, featuring multi-directional lugs for confidence-inspiring traction. From above, durable synthetic material and a stitched-down toe bumper ensure great fit, protection and comfort. 100% Synthetic Imported Rubber sole Shaft measures approximately low-top from arch Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance. Removable Sockliner: A sockliner which can be removed to accommodate a medical orthotic. Removable Sockliner: A sockliner which can be removed to accommodate a medical orthotic. Trail Specific Outsole: Reversed lugs provide uphill and downhill traction on all types of terrain. AHAR Outsole: Acronym for ASICS High Abrasion Rubber. Placed in critical areas of the outsole for exceptional durability.

description: The impressive New Balance Fresh Foam Roav running shoes are loaded with built-in technology to make your day more enjoyable. Finally, the Ultra Heel is strategically-designed to hug the back of your foot for a more supportive fit. These workout shoes are designed with your comfort in mind. The neutral cushioned running shoes hug your foot in its natural position to provide a lightly supported ride. Each element of the shoe's design is thoughtfully selected to ensure your feet are happy after daily wear. Made with a synthetic/mesh upper, these athletic shoes offer effortless wear and style. The bootie construction allows for easy on-and-off, while the stretch webbing offers even more comfort and a customized fit. These breathable shoes are here to support you through each stride, lift, squat or stretch. Weather you're exploring the city, hitting the gym or running a quick mile, opt for a shoe that keeps your foot supported while providing a cloud-like ride. 100% Mesh Imported Rubber sole Truly Unique: The New Balance Fresh Foam Roav v1 running shoes are the ultimate in casual athletic style. Pairing a bold, attractive look with plush comfort, these cushioned running shoes are in a league of their own. Fresh Foam Midsole: Feel like you're running or walking in the clouds. The first of three proprietary technologies in this athletic shoe, Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride. NDurance Outsole: Step up your game without wearing out your favorite running shoes. We walked over 25,000 steps in San Juan on a self walking tour and these were beyond comfortable. My feet felt great all day wearing them, I never had a problem with them pinching or rubbing my heels. New balance makes some of the best running shoes (in my opinion) and these Roav's did not disappoint. I will be buying additional pairs in other colors.

title: Brooks Women's Ghost 14 Neutral Running Shoe
description: Imported Rubber sole THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride that won’t distract from the fun of the run. The Ghost 14 offers a simplified midsole construction which creates more seamless transitions. This Brooks Ghost 14 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance. SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The Ghost 14 offers neutral support while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 13 BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever. DNA LOFT now makes up the entire midsole, for a softer, smoother, ride. SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions. SOFT, SECURE, FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology provides structure that moves with the foot.

reviews.title: After one wearing my hip hurt. Thankfully, the pain went away in a day.
reviews.text:
I have no idea what this company was thinking about, but the model I am reviewing was absolutely awful for me.
I have been thrilled with my Brooks ghost 11 shoes, but they keep “improving” the design.
After a 20 minute brisk walk my hip hurt in a way it has never hurt before. It was intense and uncomfortable. Luckily, it only lasted for a day.
There was no way I was going to wear these a second time.
I went to my local running store and found the Brooks glycerin 19.
They have them on Amazon, too. Just remarkably comfortable. Great cushioning and support.
I am not a fan of company’s changing a fabulous product. Innovation is not always improvement.

reviews.title: Fits well; love the style

My feet don't typically require tons of cushion or arch support, so i caution those with bad feet or those who run a lot to maybe avoid these.  I used to be a 50-60miles per week runner, and personally, i had to avoid these type of flattish-arched shoes or my feet would get sore / injured quickly.  However, for the couple miles per day I walk in the city these days (in these shoes) and the 10 miles i run per week (not in these shoes), they work perfectly.  Highly recommend

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Venture 6 MX Running Shoes
description: With a redesigned midsole and upper, our new GEL-Venture® 6 delivers excellent shock absorbing comfort, so you can take on the trail. Your tread will benefit from the rugged, one-piece outsole, featuring multi-directional lugs for confidence-inspiring traction. From above, durable synthetic material and a stitched-down toe bumper ensure great fit, protection and comfort. 100% Synthetic Imported Rubber sole Shaft measures approximately low-top from arch Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance. Removable Sockliner: A sockliner which can be removed to accommodate a medical orthotic. Removable Sockliner: A sockliner which can be removed to accommodate a medical orthotic. Trail Specific Outsole: Reversed lugs provide uphill and downhill traction on all types of terrain. AHAR Outsole: Acronym for ASICS High Abrasion Rubber. Placed in critical areas of the outsole for exceptional durability.

reviews.title: Very comfortable & supportive
reviews.text: I stand for 10+ hours a day without sitting even once. Mix in speed walking a couple miles & by the end of the day my arthritic knees, feet, & back are done. I needed new shoes for work & bought these because they were $100 less than my last pair, I liked the color selection, & figured if they didn't suit working in them well I could use them as everyday sneakers. I noticed a difference the moment I put them on. The shock absorption is fantastic & really gives great relief to my knees. I worked double shifts 2 days in a row & can't imagine how I would have felt had I not had these on. I did add inserts for my arches though because mine are higher than average & I had an extra pair. I wouldn't say the inserts are a necessity but if you have a problematic area getting some specifically for that will make these even better. I will definitely be ordering more of these for when I wear out the pair I have & possibly some for everyday use.
reviews.author: AGYAYQHJJJFI62C65J7JTHSERFOQ

title: ASICS Mens Gel-Venture 6 Running Shoe
description: The GEL-Venture 5 provides great fit and everyday comfort, with Rearfoot GEL Cushioning and a rugged outsole ideal for a variety of terrains. In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul. Rubber sole Outdoor-ready runner with mesh and brushstroke-patterned underlays Rearfoot GEL cushioning Removable sockliner accommodates medical orthotics Trail-specific outsole with reversed traction lugs AHAR outsole rubber in critical high-wear areas

title: Rockport Men's Eureka Walking Shoe Sneaker
description: The Ridgefield Eureka combines the comfort of a walking shoe with the look of an everyday casual-so you never have to compromise. With San Crispino construction for heel stability, generous collar and tongue padding, removable footbed, and a Strobel construction build for forefoot flexibility. Rockport has always been one step ahead of the times, believing the perfect shoe has not yet been invented. This positive dissatisfaction compels them to constantly improve upon their footwear. Founded in 1971, they were the first company to use advanced athletic technologies in casual shoes to achieve lightweight comfort, and the first company to engineer walking comfort in dress and casual shoes. 100% Leather Imported Rubber sole Shaft measures approximately low-top from arch GENUINE LEATHER: Leather upper is easy to clean and maintain, so these walking shoes for men look and feel even better with time FATIGUE-FIGHTING FOOTBED: Latex foam footbed generously cushions the foot to help reduce foot fatigue as you stand and walk BREATHABLE LINING: Moisture-wicking mesh lining offers breathability to create extra-comfortable walking shoes for men IMPACT-ABSORBING: EVA midsole provides flexible, lightweight impact absorption STABILITY AND TRACTION: Rubber outsole offers long-wearing durability, and helps to maintain a sure stride on a variety of surfaces A STABLE STRIDE: San Crispino construction provides a wide base of support for all-day stability EXTRA PADDING: Padded collar helps to prevent blisters and irritation for optimal cushioned comfort

reviews.text: Ordered for my son for his graduation from high school. They look good, the fit was comfortable over all--with one exception. Something about the 'tongue' where it hit the top of his foot annoyed him. Made his foot sore. He loosened the shoes, still did not work .  He made it through being on stage, the reception and going out after. I told him we will pad the shoe to see if it helps, or go to a shoe repair for assistance. I do recommend these shoes: they are Rockports, which my husband has worn for years. The shoes will wear like iron, they have good support, my son can wear these to work. They are worth the little bit of money I will invest in them.

reviews.title: Rockport. Rockport.
reviews.text:
Been around a long time. Were great quality shoes. Then went bankrupt, I believe. Brand bought by others and the quality has not suffered one bit in the move from Rockport, Maine (hence the name) to wherever the factories are right now.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Venture 5 Running Shoes
description: The GEL-Venture 5 provides great fit and everyday comfort, with Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System and a rugged outsole ideal for a variety of terrains. In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul. 100% Synthetic Imported Rubber sole Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance. Removable Sockliner: A sockliner which can be removed to accommodate a medical orthotic. Trail Specific Outsole: Reversed lugs provide uphill and downhill traction on all types of terrain. AHAR Outsole: Acronym for ASICS High Abrasion Rubber. Placed in critical areas of the outsole for exceptional durability.

reviews.title: Great shoe!

reviews.title: so promising and yet so disappointing
reviews.text: I hate that I hate these shoes. They look super cute, fit very well, feel very cushiony (at first) but unfortunately they cause me a lot of pain. I bought these for running after my sister recommended I try Asics. Over the last 2 years I've bought 5 pairs of running shoes and all of them cause different kinds of pain. These ones give me the worst pain in the ball of my foot, which then stretches into my toes, which then go numb - and all of this happened on a two mile walk. I didn't even begin running yet. Maybe it's my feet but I'm disappointed that I have yet another pair of shoes that I can only wear for exercises that require me to stand in place because even on the elliptical they are useless after about 15 minutes.

title: Salomon Men's Speedcross 4 Trail Running Shoes
description: The 4Th edition of our iconic and aggressively lugged trail runner for tearing through technical, soft ground with speed. Salomon was born in 1947 in the heart of the French Alps and the birthplace of modern alpinism. Driven by a passion for skiing and design innovation, Francois Salomon and his son George designed and perfected much of the first modern ski equipment. During the following 60 years, Salomon's commitment to innovative design and passion for mountain sports created a vast range of revolutionary new concepts in boots, skis and apparel and brought innovative solutions to footwear, apparel and equipment for hiking, adventure racing, mountaineering and trail running. Through performance-driven design, Salomon enhances mountain sports by converting new ideas into action and expanding the limits of possibility. 100% Synthetic Imported Rubber sole Shaft measures approximately low-top from arch The fourth generation of our legendary Speedcross lug pattern is an even hungrier monster for eating up soft, technical trails Feel one with the trail with a precise combination of Sensifit with Quicklace, performance last shape and endoFit Just enough to provide protection for technical trail running Salomon 2 year limited warranty

reviews.title: The Solomon product is by far the best shoe or trail running and hikin
reviews.text:
Solomon shoes. I'm on my third or fourth pair I think. I had the original speed cross and then I had speed cross two I think. Now I have to speak Cross 4 they have made minor improvements. The shoe is rock solid. I have a pair of Solomon speed treks same but don't fit as good as the speed cross. At least for my foot.

The speed cross have amazing grip on trail. I never wear them on concrete. I put them on before I hit the trail and take them off as soon as I get back to the car. The only downside is they're not the greatest on slick Rock or You still have to be a little careful when running or walking on slab rock. I hike in rain, cross streams or rivers. I hike up rivers. I don't take my shoes off for any obstacle. I'd wear Gators the Solomon version that fit perfect on the shoe. The drive super fast on trail unless it's cold out. I wear the compression Solomon socks with them. That trio is a perfect set for long strenuous sites through any condition.

I am forever sold on Solomon products shoes and everything else.
reviews.author: AG3FBN5AFOE6DD6WQRQYNUOINLBA

reviews.title: Sized way too small, at least for less than perfect feet
reviews.text:
I've been buying Salomon for years, this was the first time I had to return a pair of their shoes.
I could barely put my feet in them, and when I did they hurt, so I sent them back and shall find another style.

I hope this isn't the trend, but these fit like Nikes - so if you have perfect feet then by all means buy these, otherwise stay away because they were too narrow and too tight for me.

Quality is superior for those still interested - they are so well made.

reviews.title: Very stylish and comfortable sneaker at very reasonable price!
reviews.text:
I wasn't sure if I would like wearing this style of slip-on sneakers, so i was interested in a lower cost pair. These are wonderful and look as good as higher-priced brands from stores such as Nordstrom. I purchased my normal shoe size of 7.5, since I knew I would never being wearing these with thick socks. I was pleased to find that they are comfortable from day one - no break in period necessary. I will be wearing these around town and would even wear them to travel.
This is a great neutral color that compliments a majority of my wardrobe! Will be looking into purchasing other colors.

reviews.title: 4 stars because they are tight at first
reviews.text: I normally wear a 6.5 in shoes but ordered a 7 in these after reading other reviews that the shoes are a bit tight, glad I did!  Out of the box - looked exactly like the picture but so tight when I put them on.  Since I own them and hate the process of breaking them in myself, I used shoe stretchers to break them in, but walking around in them for an hour would have worked as well.  The shoes have fit fantastically since then, they hold their stretch pretty well after you break them in.  I’ve only had them for a few weeks so I’m not sure if they will become too wide or too big in a few months like some reviews have said.  The soles are removable, but they’re pretty comfortable as is.  I also have a bit of Morton’s Neuroma and the shoes haven’t bothered it so far.

title: Fila Women's Disruptor II Sneaker
description: Amazon.com This lightweight, retro-inspired sneaker from Fila is perfect for every day and then some. Made with a durable nubuck upper with a smooth, soft finish, this shoe features a removable cushioned insole and an extra-thick rubber sole for excellent shock absorption. A padded tongue and collar and soft lining keep feet feeling fresh and comfortable throughout the day. From the Manufacturer Fila began in 1911 in the small alpine town of Biella, Italy, a place renowned for manufacturing the world's finest textiles and weaving fabrics with impeccable quality, true innovation, and extraordinary beauty. Born of the city and its traditions, Fila is inspired by Biella's dedication to artistry, luxury, and elegance. It's Fila's birthright, it's in their soul, and it defines their future. They continue to enrich the athletic experience by improving comfort and performance with Italian design, quality craftsmanship, and refined materials. There is no feeling quite as luxurious as that of playing in Fila, and that is the reason for Fila's existence. They create what is desired, not just what is necessary. Take your non-traditional, society-rejecting ways beyond the track with the Fila Disruptor II Premium. Lightweight leather and synthetic upper. Traditional lace-up closure. Breathable mesh lining. Padded insole.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Venture 8 Running Shoes
description: The GEL-VENTURE 8 running shoe is designed for the great outdoors. This versatile shoe is excellent for trail runs, light hiking or exploring a new city. This model has been updated with a more accommodating forefoot fit, while reducing the amount of overlays around the forefoot without sacrificing durability. Lastly, the outsole is more durable with a traction pattern that's been improved with re-engineered lugs under the heel. All of these updates make the new GEL-VENTURE 8 shoe a recommended companion for your next adventure. Synthetic-and-mesh Imported lug-sole sole GEL Technology: Cushioning provides excellent shock absorption Re-engineered outsole lugs for better off-road traction: Reduced amount of overlays around the forefoot without sacrificing durability:

reviews.title: Absolutely Fabulous
reviews.text: Is this what new shoes feel like now?? I wore a pair I liked so much for 10 years,  still going,  and I guess I didn't realize that maybe over time the comfort level gradually faded and I didn't notice; these actually cushion my feet across the whole bottom and my feet stopped hurting as soon as I put them on! I have narrow feet and someone told me to try this brand which I never wore before.  I have a spring in my step and much better balance; i carried 3 large packages up a curb at UPS. That's something I couldn't have done yesterday.  (I have neuropathy and poor balance and my feet are numb with weak leg muscles.) I'm so much more capable now.  Before I avoided standing up.  Plus I got a great deal and I like the color.  Asics is my new goto brand.

reviews.title: This may be the shoe I have been looking for?
reviews.text:
I have planters Faseiitis and have been wearing the same style of Kmart shoes with orthotics for 8 years. Kmart is no longer making the shoe I was wearing. So, I have been looking for a replacement for several months, with no success. I have tried at least 10 different shoes in the 25-40 dollar price range with no success. My feet seem so sensitive to new shoes that the second I put them on my feet begin to hurt. Since I was having no success, I decided to spend a little more money and give the New Balance entry level shoe a try. When I first put them on they felt better than all the others I had tried. There is plenty of room in the 9W I ordered. Lots of padding. So with room and padding I was off to a good start. I had no problem removing the insoles and inserting my orthotics. As has been mentioned in other reviews, the straps are too short. One shoe was worse than the other, it would just barely close. This problem is resolving itself the more I wear the shoes. The other problem mentioned in other reviews is the fact that these shoes squeak. The noise is coming from the rubbing of the tonque on the Velcro straps. Not a deal breaker but annoying. I will try applying some saddle soap and see if that helps. The shoes appears to be well made with a very sturdy looking sole. I have been wearing the shoes now for a few hours each day. So far they are doing better than anything else I have tried. However, it is a little too early to know if this will be my new favorite shoe. In general, I think you should give this shoe a try if planters Faseiitis is a problem, or anyone looking for a good walking shoe at a fair price.
UPDATE-I used saddle soap on the tongue and straps and that stop the squeaking.
reviews.author: AGEGRCKAVOOM2RWMHNQZATHZTUXA

reviews.title: durable and comfortable
reviews.text: OK, so I was not expecting these to be comfortable for my 12.5hr shifts, nor was I expecting them to be durable. Surprise!! They are both. I am a nurse, enough said about comfort. I got poop on them, washed them in my washing machine, expecting to remove tattered and torn, I found them clean and INTACT!!!!! The color is just as bright as the day I  bought them. My coworkers are spending $150 or more on HOKA and I got these cheeeeap!! I love them!!!! Plus, when it rains they don't squeak????? I was so surprised, I don't know what to say about that. The heel is see thru and there isn't even any water inside after washing them. Sized very accurate, if anything they were 1/2 inch longer than expected. I wear a 7.5 in womens U.S. and these are not tight AT ALL, if I had gotten an 8, which I normally do when buying online and especially foreign, I would have been in trouble. Get them! I am getting another color as soon as I finish typing.

title: WHITIN Men's Cross-Trainer | Barefoot & Minimalist Shoe | Zero Drop Sole | Wide Toe Box
description: Rubber sole Padded rear collar pad for achilles comfort. 5 mm POWER FOOTBED for underfoot cushioning. Engineered knit upper for a sock-like fit and flexible feel. reviews.title: Flexible but protective
reviews.text: Feels like other barefoot shoes but with some slightly thicker soles. The shape still feels like zero heel height shoes but with a little more material between you and the ground which is kind of nice if you walk on rocky or irregular surfaces. Soles are grippy but make that "basketball court" squeak on smooth surfaces sometimes. The uppers are breathable and comfortable and the tension is around the midfoot which feels good. You hardly feel anything around the ankle which is nice. The toe spread is moderate. If you have normal width feet you'll probably be ok but if you tend to favor wider shoes it feels like how normal width should feel, but at no point does my foot roll over the sole. They fit kind of tight but after a few days of wear they loosened up. I usually wear 11.5 and ordered an 11, after that initial break-in, they feel fine.

Otherwise, I would give it a 10 on a 10 scale, being extremely comfortable.

reviews.title: Quality, minimal, and great shoe
reviews.text:
Great minimalist shoe that is high quality and is very comfortable! Not the best if you want to do athletic movements from side to side as your foot tends to roll but is great if you don't overdo it! I've had it for months and they've held up awesome. Was skeptical about the brand but it has turned out to be my favorite shoe; all my 100+ Brooks, Asics, Nikes, etc sit unused now. My Achilles don't ache anymore after using this!

Be wary to ease into using these or you might get injured if you're used to padded shoes. Overall I would definitely recommend these to anyone looking into affordable but quality shoes!

title: Reebok Men's Bb4500 Hi 2 Sneaker
description: Reebok Men's Royal Bb4500 Hi2 Sneaker helps you show your respect for the game while keeping classic, everyday style on point. These mid-cut, basketball-inspired men's shoes are sure to be an instant favorite, with a blended leather and mesh upper weighing in for heritage comfort. Plus, a removable sockliner helps keep feet happy all day long. Reebok was founded for one of the best reasons possible: athletes wanted to run faster. So in the 1890s, Joseph William Foster made some of the first known running shoes with spikes in them. By 1895, he was in business making shoes by hand for top runners; and before long his fledgling company, J.W. Foster and Sons, developed an international clientele of distinguished athletes. 100% Synthetic Imported Rubber sole Shaft measures approximately mid-top from arch DURABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT MATERIAL: These game sneakers feature leather and mesh upper for a blend of support and breathability EFFICIENT FOOT SUPPORT: These stylish trainers feature high abrasion rubber outsole adds durable responsiveness and lasts many jogs and games REMOVABLE ORTHOTICS INSERT: This footwear features removable EVA sockliner accommodates orthotics and offers cushion COMFORTABLE AND STURDY DESIGN: This footwear features mid-cut design for added stability and support around the ankles HIGH-PERFORMANCE SPORTS SHOES: Ideal for daily, casual wear, basketball, and athleisure

title: Brooks Men's Ghost 14 Neutral Running Shoe
description: Smooth roads are ahead when you put on the Ghost 14. This award-winning runner favorite now features 100% DNA LOFT in the midsole, for a softer, smoother ride. We’ve also improved the fit so the shoe adjusts even more comfortably to your foot. THIS MEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride that won’t distract from the fun of the run. The Ghost 14 offers a simplified midsole construction which creates more seamless transitions. This Brooks Ghost 14 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe. SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The Ghost 14 offers neutral support while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 13 BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever. DNA LOFT now makes up the entire midsole, for a softer, smoother, ride. SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions. SOFT, SECURE, FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology provides structure that moves with the foot.

reviews.title: Brooks has lost a step on wear/quality, but still a very good shoe
reviews.text:
First, Brooks is a top running shoe manufacturer, and I always like buying their products, and they are to be applauded for releasing shoes in widths, which lets you get a shoe that fits, which is essential. If a shoe does not fit properly, then it will be extremely difficult to run (or walk any distance in). The Brooks Glycerin is one model up from the Ghost, that has better cushioning, but is no longer available in a Narrow width, and is more expensive, but the Ghost is a pretty good shoe on its own. I would have given the Ghost 5 stars, but the Ghost 14 is not quite perfect, having two areas where it could be better (and was better previously).

The first picture shows a Ghost 14 (on the left), next to a Ghost 13 (the previous model, on the right), and you can see the Ghost 14 has less tread, so wears out sooner, I would say roughly 50-75 miles of road (asphalt) running. The picture shows both shoes new. The Ghost 13 also was a little more cushioned, but you can offset that some by putting a different insole in the 14, and a lot of runners replace the insoles anyway. The thinner tread means less mileage on the 14s, but still probably as good as most of the competition, just no longer better here.

The second pictures shows the upper collar on a Ghost 14, and the fabric Brooks is using there (not so much on the 13 and earlier models) is nice and soft, but does not hold up. I generally see holes or failures at the top of the lace area, and on some shoes, towards the back collar area. You get a lot of fraying, sometimes holes, which is more an appearance problem than anything that would impact running in them, but means also you cannot wear them casually, at least where someone might see the failures. That may be an aspect that is supply chain related, they used to hold up better, but I have seen the problem on two pair of Ghost 14s, and other manufacturers do a bit better (probably needs a bit more nylon, to hold up longer).

I will say that the Ghost 14 has a narrower tongue at the top, that is shared with the 13 but was new there, and I have not seen it much in other shoes, but actually works very well, so I give kudos to Brooks on that design innovation. There is less chance that during a run the tongue will shift over into the forefoot, at least in a painful way, and you don't have to stop to shift it back.

So overall, particularly at this price point, the Brooks continues to be good value and one of the top shoes to consider, but as with anything, there are a couple of areas that could use further improvement.
reviews.author: AHXZZRPP65AP7ACEAMVC75A4JNAQ

reviews.title: would pass
reviews.text:

The shoe is slightly narrower, has absolutely no cushion, less tread than my previous shoes, and squeaks with each step. The laces are cheaper and the top of the shoe is thinner. I'm returning these. This is a 35$ shoe being sold at 130$ range. No thanks.

After several faithful years buying brooks, I'm now trying their competitor's shoes.

edit: Bought Saucony's for 60$ that were so drastically better than this brooks shoe. I've moved on.

reviews.title: UPDATE!! These shoes KILL 😭
reviews.text:
UPDATED REVIEW: If you HATE your feet... buy these shoes. If you're a masochist... buy these shoes. Except, whatever you do, DO NOT BUY THESE SHOES!!!

Unfortunately, I have wore these shoes *very* little up until my Returns period ran out. Maybe 5 minutes to walk down to the mailbox or 30 minutes to drive to town and pick up a grocery order. Never once did I wear them to walk in for more than, literally, 10 minutes. And the discomfort I attributed to 'breaking them in'... NOPE. I was working out in the yard today - second Autumn day here in Georgia, so I've put all sandals and flip flops away for outdoors - and both days I have legitimately had to come inside and take the shoes off because my left foot was in excruciating pain. The right shoe has never been as uncomfortable as the left, so it is possible I've gotten a defective pair. However, given that I have never personally owned Asics before, even if I could return/exchange, I would not try again.

Also, my feet cramped like a mutha🤬 when I laid down in bed last night. (Ladies, if you've ever worn extremely cheapo flats in your life, and you have any semblance of an arch, you'll know what I'm talking about).

-10 ⭐️ If I could!!

4.5 Stars, but I rounded up -

They're not as comfortable as Skechers, more comfortable than Saucony. Nice enough looking on, with shorts and leggings, without being clunky (some shoes just look clunky when wearing shorts or the fitted leggings, IMO, if you have normal sized calves and wear a size 9 like I do). I don't know why, but the lack of a )( on top of the mesh, at the toes, where it would run from the rubber toe point to the laces section, doesn't look good. Again, I do not know why that bothers me but it bothers me bad enough every time I wear them that it almost makes me not like (the aesthetics of) the shoe. It makes that section look really broad, like I have big & broad ties with a narrow heel 🤷🏼‍♀️ and I don't. I'm probably just being picky.

reviews.title: Great shoe, colors a bit off
reviews.text:
The blue is a beautiful blue - see pic..their pic is lighter, reality it’s very dark - pretty, but with my light skin it’s too dark. The muted gold is also a bit more pronounced in real, approaching cheesy, but it’s ok.

The gray and white are actually gray and lavender. Made so light in the pic I thought it was white stripes. It’s straight up medium lavender. Not light lavender as pictured. Not for me. Both go back, but I found a cream color on ASICS website.

They’re very comfortable and give lots of support for the very good price ASICS always have. I need more arch support but just a little. My feet rotate inwards just a bit, but they’re quite good for an average sneaker!

They run as off in size as most sneakers do these days. I’m a 7.5 in all shoes for decades, but I’m an 8.5, at least, in running shoes or cross trainers. So size up a full size for sure.

A solid shoe! A terrific price.

reviews.title: Great for plantar fasciitis!
reviews.text:
I've purchased a number of different brands of sneakers all claiming to be the best shoes for plantar fasciitis, bone spurs and other orthopedic problems of the foot, and they were all SUPER unattractive.

Enter...Skechers Memory Foam sneakers! I bought a pair of these several years ago and loved them, wore them out and didn't realize that they were the reason my feet weren't hurting until I purchased a new pair this month! These are reasonably priced, hold up reasonably well, but for the pain relief, they are just AMAZING! I plan to buy several more pairs to keep on hand and pray Skechers never stops making them!!

reviews.title: Surprisingly Nice, Well-Made Shoe
reviews.text:
I wasn't really expecting much from these shoes so I was very pleasantly surprised at how nice they are. Since they were made in China, I thought they might run small but they fit my usual size exactly. They are snug-fitting but the mesh material is very flexible so they are still perfectly comfortable if my feet swell (which they do sometimes). They are very comfortable for walking although I would wear a shoe with more support for a long or vigorous walk.

I ordered the green ones and the color is exactly as was shown, a very lovely medium moss green. If you can't afford the $100 plus flyknit shoes, these are a very reasonable alternative.

One heads up, they do ship from China and took three weeks to arrive.

reviews.title: Pretty Shoe But Memory Foam Cushioning Is Not Adequate for "Power" Walking
reviews.text:
This RYKA WOMEN'S SKY WALKING SHOE (Frost Grey/Aqua SKY/Iron Grey) is very pretty, and feels great when you put it on. However, it's not a good shoe for "power" (exercise) walking. The memory foam doesn't provide much impact cushioning, so the shoe does little to reduce the strain on my knees and hips that results from walking on the sloped concrete sidewalks around my neighborhood. I do like the sole very much, because it provides great traction when the sidewalks are wet or covered with seeds from overhanging trees.

I haven't used these shoes a lot, but my very first impression was that they were NOT well made, given the price (about $43). I believe the reviews that say the memory foam breaks down and that the shoes fall apart after a couple of months of serious exercise walking. The fit isn't bad for me--an 8B always seems to fit, in any shoe--as long as the laces are tight. If I fail to lace the shoes carefully, my feet slide forward and my toes bang against the ends when I walk. So maybe the shoes are a bit shorter than I expected, or maybe I don't need the narrow heel.

The exercise walking shoe that works for me is the [[ASIN:B00GXEFBYM ASICS Women's Gel Tech Neo 4 Walking Shoe]]. The ASICS shoe costs almost twice as much, but the gel cushioning takes a lot of strain off my knees and hips. I rate this RYKA Women's Sky Walking Shoe at a generous 3 stars ("It's okay" on the official Amazon scale).

reviews.title: Will probably not last too long. Made in China.
reviews.text:
These are supercheap. . . albeit not inexpensive. . . Made in China shoes being sold by a Chinese company on Amazon.

They have a mesh upper, so they are breathable. There is some padding on the footbed. There is virtually no arch support. There is some padding around the ankle.

The sole is plastic. It is nonslip. There is some tread on the bottom, but not a lot. Probably enough tread to last the life of the shoes, which will probably not be longer than one season.

If you are the type of person who likes to exchange their shoes frequently, then the shoes can certainly work. Especially if you’re not expecting too much from them.

reviews.title: Very Pleased, watch your sizing
reviews.text: Based on other reviews I ordered 1/2 size up and W just to make sure!  Whew! I am glad I did because they are literally just right sockless.  Very comfortable, good look, good price.  I had Achilles tendon surgery in Feb this year and just now can wear shoes that are not clogs or mules.  Happy to have the support.  I wear a solid size ten and based on Keen, Propet, Uggs, Steins, Birkenstock, this has always been a good size.  I never could find an Asics to fit years ago at my old Shoe Station, but I also had no choice for a Wide or 10.5.  Eleven is just too long.  My big toe is not jammed up against the toe box AND I can actually lace up and tie the sneaker with less than 3" across the lacing area.  Very happy.  Just watch your size.

reviews.title: Awesome comfort for difficult feet
reviews.text: Purchased these for my husband to wear when are traveling.  He is not comfortable in flip flops or other sandals and going through various securities, it is nice to have a shoe that is easy on/ easy off - even when you are TSA pre-check.  These fit the bill.  My husband is diabetic and has sensitive, wide feet with a couple of hammer toes. He basically uncomfortable in most shoes. Very challenging.  These are the first shoes we have purchased he has worn for hours and hours and not complained once.  I will say that while these Sketchers are the ultimate in comfort, they (both women's and men's) break down within 6 months or so with fairly regular wear, so we keep a few pairs on hand and recycle the old ones.  The older we get, the more important comfort is and these really work.  I do recommend that if you have not tried a pair on in person, it is a good idea to do so.  Each style and sometimes different fabrics fit a little differently I've found.  But once you have the general idea, you can order them fairly reliably online.  I always update if there are any wear or other issues that may be helpful.
reviews.author: AFZUK3MTBIBEDQOPAK3OATUOUKLA

reviews.title: No breaking in!!
reviews.text: I purchased these for my daughter. She's on her feet all day in a bakery as an assistant pastry chef. Her old shoes literally fell apart. She's been wearing these for a week straight and has absolutely nothing to complain about. Her feet do not hurt when she's running around in this fast paced kitchen. The non-slip works (they grip well). She also just told me that she didn't have any breaking in period on these like she does other non slip shoes. As soon as she put them on and went to work, the comfort was there. I have yet to hear her complain her feet hurt since I purchased these for her.. So for that, I'm thankful. In her words, these shoes are awesome mom!! If possible, I will come back after she's worn them for a month or so to update on how they hold up. But comfort is everything in the business she works at!!

reviews.title: No idea what brand these are....
reviews.text:
But they're great converse knock offs. They are flat which I love but if you're hoping for any support at all, these are not for you. They are a tad big in the toes but, again, this - for me, makes a great shoe. I only want these shoes for casual comfort. Not working out, running or anything else. Just so when I walk outside to water my plants, I have shoes to throw on real quick that won't hurt my feet.

Idk what the deal is with shoes on Amazon lately though. This is the 2nd time recently that I have purchased a pair and not received the brand I ordered. I would care if they were more expensive or if I was committed to a particular brand but I knew these weren't the real deal to begin with so I let it go. Especially for the price. They definitely worked for me.

The only thing is, I can recommend them but how do you know you're going to get the ones I'm talking about ? There are at least a dozen other brands putting out generic converse that look exactly the same - down to the tread on the bottom. I have no idea if they're all coming from the same factory in China or what

So to sum up: comfortable, inexpensive flat shoes. Don't know what brand/ company is putting these out

title: Brooks Mens Ghost 12 Running Shoe
description: Synthetic-and-mesh Imported THIS MEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Neutral runners looking for a lightweight shoe and a smooth ride without sacrificing cushioning. Whether you’re a Ghost loyalist or are lacing one up for the first time, you’ll find plenty to like. SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The neutral support type provides high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 11 BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever. SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions. SOFT, SECURE, FIT: The newly engineered mesh and 3D Fit Print practically disappears on your foot with strategically placed stretch and structure.

reviews.title: I likes ‘em
reviews.text:
I’m not a runner so I can’t tell you what these or like for running in (though I’ve read good things about that), but I just wear them as every day, all around sneaks and they’re great for that. Great fit, cushy without making you feel like you’re going to fall over, and my previous pair of ghost 11s have held up nicely so I imagine these will too.

The instep on the shoes is just nylon mesh, so they’re anything but waterproof. They’re not even remotely water-resistant. But don’t expect that and I think you’ll probably be very happy with these shoes. Maybe not – different people’s feet are different and I’ve read a few reviews from people who aren’t thrilled with these. But for my part I’ve had a full range of shoes and sneakers over the years, some great and some not so much, and these are among the ones I’ve been happiest with. May you have a similar experience!
reviews.author: AGCIK7B4BXDHQE3FAQ5JMIDJMKDA

description: Comfort takes the lead with the new gel-excite™ 4 shoe. Featuring rearfoot gel® cushioning technology, the gel-excite™ 4 shoe is the latest development in an energetic running shoe that is versatile enough for moderate mileage and all day use. In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul. 100% Synthetic Imported Rubber sole Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance. reviews.title: Runs big
reviews.text:
Just got these today so it’s a quick review. I bought a size 10 wide. These are definitely wide enough but a bit too loose. They run big! I usually wear an 11. I’m glad I sized down based on other reviews but they’re still too big. I think with the right no-show socks they might be ok. But I am trying a
9 1/2 wide to see if those will be better. Then I’ll decide which pair to keep. The exchange process was extremely easy! I’m glad Amazon now offers this option, it’s fairly new. I’ll have 30 days to send back the pair I’m not keeping without having to actually pay for the other pair right away. Just for what I keep. Keep in mind if you do this, and don’t send the item back, they’ll charge you for it after the 30 days.

When I tried them on they did feel comfy, like I could wear them all day. I had surgery on both of my feet and need something dressy to wear to the office and meetings, So far sneakers are the only thing to help with my foot pain so I’m hoping these will work out well. They look like they’ll be nice to wear with a simple skirt or dress or even dress pants.
I’m only giving 3 stars for now since I haven’t actually worn them out yet. But I’ll come back to update this in the future

reviews.title: Good basic shoe but not long lasting if you are on your feet a lot
reviews.text: I purchased these shoes for support at work but was wary as I wore out the support in a new pair of NB new shoes in the past during a week of set-up and weekend of holding a garage sale.  These lasted about 2 weeks before the support wore down and my feet started hurting at the end of the day.  I am in the medical field and treat patients all day but I am not constantly on my feet like a nurse.  These would be good for casual wear and walks but not for durability.  One thing that I did not like initially (which is an easy fix with replacement laces) is that the corded laces come undone easily and I am having to retie these 3-4 times a day (even though I double knot them).

title: New Balance Men's 680v6 Cushioning Running Shoe
description: Outfitted with a performance-based outsole, the 680v6 is a reliable upgrade from our popular 680 men's running shoe. Plus, a mesh upper provides a conforming and comfortable fit. New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best. 100% Synthetic Rubber sole Synthetic/mesh upper Responsive EVA midsole with ABZORB cushioning NB Response 2.0 performance insert

title: Brooks Men's Adrenaline GTS 21 Running Shoe
description: Imported THIS MEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a supportive shoe that's soft and smooth, the Adrenaline GTS 21 offers an improved ride and reliable support for however your body moves so you can forget the shoes and enjoy the run. This Brooks Adrenaline GTS 21 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance. SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides just the right amount of stability and support, great for overpronation while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Adrenaline GTS 20 BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: The DNA LOFT Crash Pad cushions each footfall and works with BioMoGo DNA to adapt to your every stride. MODERNIZED FIT: A streamlined, engineered mesh upper with 3D Fit Print offers the structure and proven fit the Adrenaline is known for-without excess bulk. GUIDERAILS HOLISTIC SUPPORT SYSTEM: We've shifted our focus beyond the feet to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees. GuideRails keep you moving comfortably by keeping excess movement in check.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Excite 6 Running Shoes
description: Enjoy the freedom of running on the open road with the women's GEL-EXCITE 6 running shoe, specifically designed to help you go the distance. Featuring GEL technology to the rear for comfort and bounce with every step, this ASICS running shoe with its high-level of energized cushioning is sure to keep you going even across the most challenging distances. Designed with Jacquard mesh fabric to allow the feet to stay cool and dry even when working up a sweat, this men's running shoe will keep your feet fresher and in top condition for longer. Set on a durable outsole for a hardwearing quality, it features AMPLIFOAM technology for a flexible and tactile ride. Lightweight for easier running, its ORTHOLITE sockliner also helps with effective moisture management while providing responsive rebound to improve your overall technique. Packaged neatly in a contemporary design, with signature ASICS stripes thrown into the mix, the GEL-EXCITE 6 model is a versatile footwear option that puts your comfort first. Weight: 8.35. Heel Height: 20mm. Forefoot Height: 12mm. Synthetic-and-mesh Rubber sole AmpliFoam Midsole - Engineered to maintain durability at softer densities, providing better flexibility, comfort, and platform adaptability ideal for natural running Rearfoot GEL technology cushioning system - Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance Ortholite Sockliner - Moisture management (Ortholite is a registered trademark of ATP Manufacturing LLC)

reviews.title: Great alternative to cleats for some field sports
reviews.text:
As a 55 yo ulitimate frisbee and touch-football player these were a great find. They allowed totally adequate field traction while being not much heavier than cleats. The best part is the impact on my joints is much less with these shoes than if I'd have used cleats. The ankle support wasn't an issue either.

I use them for running/hiking as well and love them. The tread is lasting longer than most shoes I've purchases. The shoe tightening mechanism work well. The price is reasonable.

Love the color and look of the army green Speedcross 5's - I will just wear them casually when they get to worn for sports usage.

Price: 2 stars

Really liked the fit and feel of the shoe. Very good support when you are on your feet all day. Bought these for my husband who works at Amazon in the fulfillment center as I had a very good experience with the women's version.
Unfortunately within 2 months the mesh detached, which I fixed with some fabric mesh and glue. Then the shoes started to tear at the top mesh in a manner that was irreparable. reviews.title: Love Saucony's But Sizing Has Changed
reviews.text: I have normal to high-arched kayaks, so it's not easy for me to find shoes that fit properly.  Saucony tends to run narrow which I'm grateful for.  I've noticed, however, that the sizing (not just on these but everything) has become unreliable.  My last pair (purchased only 2 years ago) were a 10.5 and fit great...room in the toe box....and width was perfect WITHOUT an orthotic.  So I figured buying another 10.5 would be a no-brainer, right?  Nope.  The new 10.5's are shorter in the toe box (I was able to easily compare them), and the overall fit of the shoe seems wider.  So I had to exchange them for 11's.  Egads!  I've never been an 11!.  They have more room in the toe box, but they're also a bit wide for me.  However, I'm able to make them work by removing the insoles (yes, they're removable) and using my own (Superfeet Green ) + a bit thicker socks.  This seems to elevate my foot so I can compensate for the unwanted width.  It also makes them more cushioned and supportive.
reviews.author: AEMRW74WOEBX33JMZZV47XITIEEQ

reviews.title: Arch support might bother some
reviews.text:
The color patterns of the Fenlern athletic shoes are very cute, and they fit true to size (I ordered 7.5). There's a great platform air cushion that will add support to your weary feet, but there's an added support feature that might displease some wearers. Inside the shoe, built/sewn into the sole is a series of lumps and bumps that are designed to help your foot with proper placement and pressure. When I wore the shoe, I had no problem with it. When my mom wore the shoe (we're the same size) she cried out in agony after only thirty seconds.
I think this is going to be a love-it-or-leave-it shoe. If you're used to arch supports in your shoes, or perhaps if you usually buy inserts, you'll probably be alright with the Fenlerns. But there is a chance that they will hurt you and you'll be unable to wear them. Also, the bottoms of these shoes are extremely slick and squeaky. My cat was so scared of the sound, she hissed at me and ran and hid under the couch until I took them off.
reviews.author: AFMYD2O2LVQ5HWBCF54SM445F6MA

reviews.title: Runs slightly smaller than my other shoes
reviews.text:
I walk between 55-65mi a week and wore through my previous pair of Under Armour Charged Assert 9 shoes in 2mo flat. I was searching for a running shoe under $50 offered in 4E width to replace them with.

I came across these Asics and was very excited to try them out. They're very lightweight and have pretty good grip, though I haven't stepped through any water on asphalt yet. They run slightly smaller than my previous pairs of shoes, I'd recommend going a half size up if you're worried about the sizing. These are snug and I have the laces backed out pretty far, but I'm sure after a few days, they'll be worn in a bit.

The heel cup has a lot of padding, which is comfortable. Overall, I think these are a pretty good value for the cost, I'm hoping they stretch out a bit with more wear. I do think they have a lot more support initially, I'm hoping it retains throughout my time with this pair of shoes.

reviews.title: Compared these to my Brooks Ghost 10
reviews.text:
I compared these to my Brooks Ghost 10 running shoes that I use for walking. They were over three times as expensive as these shoes and I can’t see any reason why as they don’t seem three times as good. That said, the Brooks Ghost shoes are extremely comfortable.
These shoes have the exact same, or almost the exact same, measurements as the Brooks’.
The black with white logo was sleek and attractive.
They are super comfy, though they don’t provide a ton of support. Neither do the Brooks’.
If after wearing these for a while I have a different opinion I will be sure to update the review.

reviews.title: WHY TWO stars when I LOVE Saucony brand
reviews.text:
I have multiple pairs of Saucony. I wear them for working out, walking, running errands. Unless I am getting dressed up, my shoe of choice (and have been since 1990's when I realized they were a better fit, out of the box, than any of the other leading brands).

My Experience:

FIT - still fit out of the box. I wear an 8.5 in Saucony's and no matter which style I get, they fit. HOWEVER, the left insole is considerably higher than right. Just not comfortable and you're constantly aware of it.

COMFORT - OK comparing these to the Cohesion 11 (which I have two pairs of), not nearly as much comfort, cushion. And like I mentioned, left insole higher, so just weird and wonky walking or running in these.

QUALITY - overall, quality seems higher on the Cohesion 11, just looking at upper shoe, and how much more cushion the 11 has. So lower quality than the 11 overall.

COLOR - The purple color is WHY I ordered these over the Cohesion 11. I figured the 10 would be similar and the 10 had the GREAT purple color, the 11 didn't. But it isn't the color that is what you're walking on!

PRICE - EVEN though less cushion than the Cohesion 11, I would have kept them if the insole in left wasn't so different than right.

BOTTOMLINE: After this, will stick with the Cohesion 11 (or may try 12 or 13, I look at reviews). The 11 I have been really happy with. So if unless you're a hardcore jogger logging lots of miles, I would think the 11 would suffice for you. The 10, not so much.

title: Brooks Women's Adrenaline GTS 22 Supportive Running Shoe
description: Smooth and steady wins the run: our most-loved support shoe is better than ever. With an updated midsole made with 100% DNA LOFT, and featuring our trusted GuideRails support, the Adrenaline GTS 22 delivers our smoothest ride yet. Imported THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride, with great cushion and trusted GuideRails support that won’t distract from the fun of the run. This Brooks Adrenaline GTS 22 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe. SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides just the right amount of stability and support, great for overpronation while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Adrenaline GTS 21 BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: The updated midsole is now 100% DNA LOFT cushioning paired with the Segmented Crash Pad for an even softer, smoother ride and easier flow from landing to toe-off. MODERNIZED FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology offers the structure and proven fit the Adrenaline is known for without excess bulk. GUIDERAILS HOLISTIC SUPPORT SYSTEM: We've shifted our focus beyond the feet to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees. GuideRails keep you moving comfortably by keeping excess movement in check.

reviews.title: Good but not very stylish
reviews.text: I bought this shoe because I have plantar fasciatis (sp?) and my doctor wanted me to get a good shoe with a solid sole. Not one that would bend in half. So I ordered this and I have to say that my problem is well on its way to being healed. However  I can't say much for the fashion, they're very wide at the ball of the foot and don't look very pretty in my estimation but I bought them for a specific reason and for that they're working out.

reviews.title: Great Fit
reviews.text: Brooks are my favorite!  I'm on my feet a lot either working out or walking they always give me the support I need and they are comfortable all day!  I am 5' 10", 175lbs & 57 years young! I ordered a 10.5 and they fit perfectly.  I stopped buying size 10 altogether in all brands I think my feet got bigger as I got older and even though I don't like it the 10.5 gives my toes a little more room and being on the go I'm more about comfort and support.  They are always stylish and these are light grey, pink and black! Highly recommend!

reviews.title: DO NOT BUY GTS 21 as replacement. Unwearable-painful. Ruined my feet on my 20 mile training run.
reviews.text: I have bought probably at least 14 pairs of Adrenalines in the older models over the past few years as a marathon runner. I had a 20 mile training run today and put on this new pair of GTS 22 (I had been running in the 21s but they are now discontinued). I almost couldn't finish my run-the toe box is so much narrower and less give, my toes were in excruciating pain after just a few miles. I also have bleeding blisters on my heels. I will never wear these again. Lost 130 dollars on a pair of shoes that is useless. DO NOT BUY AS REPLACEMENT FOR GTS 21. I wish I could get my money back. They are NOT THE SAME SHOE  as before. Terrible product.

reviews.title: After about 3 months these feel flat and my feet hurt from walking relatively short distances daily
reviews.text: They don’t serve me as long as I could hope.  For the price.  Maybe they need a better insole.  After 3 months, my back and neck and feet hurt.  I walk the neighborhood daily.  And would like to do modest jogging now that it’s spring.  Anyway.  This is my second or third pair of these recently.  I think maybe I liked them at first because of the slightly wider toe box than Nike Air Max.  I moved up from a size 8 and 1/2 to a size 9.  And now they don’t rub the heel to form blisters there.  My toes don’t feel cramped together tightly.  They have a very good feel at first, for a few months only, due to the cushioning.  There is not a lot of support - for the clunkiest of this shoe there’s only a moderate amount of support.  Yet some flexibility to run or walk easily, without feeling too heavy or clunky.  Nice look.  But I need a shoe at this price that feels great for more than 3 months only!  Wow!

title: Fila Men's F-13 M fashion-sneakers
description: Kick it old school with this blackout hi-top sneaker from FILA. The F-13 delivers a stealthy look with a synthetic and fabric upper over a grippy manmade sole. Lace up front with a hook-and-loop Velcro collar makes for the perfect fit and a shoe that can hit the streets in style. Fila began in 1911, in the small alpine town of Biella, Italy, a place renowned for manufacturing the world's finest textiles, and weaving fabrics with impeccable quality, true innovation and extraordinary beauty. Born of the city and its traditions, Fila is inexorably derived from Biella's dedication to artistry, luxury and elegance. This is our birthright, it's in our soul, and it defines our future. We continue to enrich the athletic experience by improving comfort and performance with Italian design, quality craftsmanship and refined materials. There is no feeling quite as luxurious as that of playing in Fila, and that is the reason for our existence. We create what is desired, not what is necessary. Not just enough, but more than you need. This is Fila. 100% Leather/Synthetic Imported Rubber sole Upper - Leather provides lateral support Midsole - EVA for cushioning and comfort Outsole - solid rubber provides traction and durability Classic Heritage style with fashionable looks Select distribution and unique product assortment

reviews.title: Not what I paid for..
reviews.text:
Been wearing converse low tops for the past 20 years. Purchased these maroon Chuck Taylor low tops recently, and I wasn’t thrilled.. why converse can’t get their sizing right compared to every other shoe manufacturer is beyond me. With one stars I needed to order a half size down, with Chuck Taylor canvas I need to order a full size down (if you’re a size 9.5 men’s normally, you’ll wanna order an 8.5). These fit big. I have more room in front of my toe than with any other sneaker. And they look big on my feet.

Beyond the fit, there are videos online showing how to tell if Chuck Taylor converse are counterfeit or real.. I purchased a shoe with the “o” in converse having a star in the center. That is how to tell if they’re legitimate sneakers made by converse. What I received by amazon are sneakers with a plain old “o” , no star, see photos..

It’s increasingly frustrating to pay for prime membership, but feel like your just another shopper. I don’t feel like it’s my job to dig through countless sellers on amazon to determine which are selling legitimate products, and which are selling knock offs.
Amazon should be doing a better job at that.
reviews.author: AGJLBGTIUBG25NDLCNSS6E7EIVQQ

reviews.title: Converse Mens Chuck All Star Black Low Sneaker
reviews.text:
I wear a women's size 11 USA. The chart that displays the size ratio of Converse men's to women's says a men's 8 equals a woman's 10. I read the previous reviews about how these shoes run large so I opted for the size 8 men's and they are actually a little long. The width is o.k. but I wish they were a quarter of an inch or so shorter, but they still fit well enough. I have a pair of Converse shoes just like these except white, and underneath the tongue it says it's a men's 8 and they fit perfectly so I was a little surprised that these were on the long side. I've always loved the classic Converse tennis shoe whether it's a high top or low top. I recently purchased the black low top and like I said earlier, it fits well enough except for being a little too long in the toe. The good thing about that though, is that I'll never have to worry about my toes getting crunched when walking down steep inclines.

I don't know about men's sizes, but if you are buying a pair of these shoes for a woman, it might be a real good idea to go down a size from what she normally wears in other shoes.

title: Skechers Men's Gowalk 5-Elastic Stretch Athletic Slip-on Casual Loafer Walking Shoe Sneaker
description: Skechers is an award-winning global lifestyle brand, offering shoes, apparel and accessories that appeal to trend-savvy men, women and kids everywhere. The brand’s styles include the latest innovative sport, casual, dress casual and fashion sneakers as well as sandals and boots—with many collections featuring Skechers Memory Foam insoles for added comfort. reviews.title: My First Pair of Slip On Sneakers
reviews.text:
I own more pairs of shoes right now that at any time in my life. Part of the reason is because I am involved in more activities than I was in the past and I am thus in need of more types of shoes. My desire to diversify further led me to get my feet inside a pair of INZCOU Men's Non-Slip Gym Sneakers.

I’ve owned lots of pairs of sneakers, but this is the first time I have owned sneakers that do not have a tongue. Instead, these shoes are slip- on and that makes them a little easier to put on because you don’t have to reach down and pull the tongue out, like you commonly do with other shoes. Once they are slipped into place, you tie and are ready to go.

These shoes fit about as expected. The only small issue I had was with the arch support in one of the shoes- it seemed a little off and it hurt at first. But after walking around for a while, everything is fine now. And since these are the first pair of black sneakers I have ever owned, they match up nicely with my darker jeans. It’s a welcome change from the white sneakers I usually wear.

It’s good to have a variety of shoes and INZCOU sneakers have proven a good addition to my collection. I will still wear traditional sneakers, the type that doesn’t slip on. But I am happy to add this set of sneakers to my growing supply.

reviews.title: Disappointing “Versafoam”
reviews.text:
First of all, Saucony is my favorite tennis shoe brand to wear. I’ve owned lots of pairs of tennis shoes made by Saucony from running shoes to jazz dance shoes and they have always been my go-to Brand for tennis shoes.
As I have gotten older, I am noticing that my feet hurt more and more, I own a greenhouse nursery and am on my feet all day, almost everyday. I’m noticing some pains in my feet that I didn’t have before. Most of my jobs throughout my adulthood have been jobs where I had to stand/walk a lot so I’m no stranger to foot fatigue.
Being that these shoes are labeled “Versafoam” I assumed they would have arch support and feel like walking on a light, squishy cloud. NO, NO, NO!!
For some odd reason, Saucony has used an extremely thin insert (see picture) and underneath the insert is a HARD platform. Yes, the sole of this tennis shoe is Versafoam, but what good is this foam when you use a hard platform on top of the foam?!?! So, you’re basically walking on a very thin insert which is on top of a hard platform which is on top of Versafoam.
Poor design and definitely not what I had expected in a Saucony shoe.
I had high hopes for these tennies but sadly am disappointed that they are not comfortable like I would expect a Versafoam type shoe to be.
The shoe looks great and fits true to size, it just falls short on the comfort level.
I am sending them back :(
Here are my stats: 5’4” 135 lbs., athletic build and active.
